remediationTemplates.name: Enable Microsoft Entra User by User ID
remediationTemplates.description: Enables a Microsoft Entra user account by setting accountEnabled to true. This allows the user access to the account again after it was disabled.

remediationTemplates.name: Disable Microsoft Entra User by User Principal Name
remediationTemplates.description: Disables a Microsoft Entra user account by setting accountEnabled to false. This prevents the user from signing in while preserving the account and its data.

remediationTemplates.name: Disable Microsoft Entra User by User ID
remediationTemplates.description: Disables a Microsoft Entra user account by setting accountEnabled to false. This prevents the user from signing in while preserving the account. The user remains within the active users listing.

remediationTemplates.name: Revoke Microsoft Entra User Sessions by User Principal Name
remediationTemplates.description: Revokes all active Microsoft Entra sessions for a specific user account by setting the value 'signInSessionsValidFromDateTime' to the present time, invalidating all sessions that were started previously. This requires that the user log in again to continue using the application. The action should be performed when an account could be accessed through a device or token that may no longer be in the user's control.

remediationTemplates.name: Revoke Microsoft Entra User Sessions by User ID
remediationTemplates.description: Revokes all active Microsoft Entra sessions for a specific user account by setting the value 'signInSessionsValidFromDateTime' to the present time, invalidating all sessions that were started previously. This requires that the user log in again to continue using the application. The action should be performed when an account could be accessed through a device or token that may no longer be in the user's control.

remediationTemplates.name: Enable Microsoft Entra User by User Principal Name
remediationTemplates.description: Enables a Microsoft Entra user account by setting accountEnabled to true. This restores the user's ability to sign in.
